subcodes.first_line: O thou who art putting Abdu’l-Baha to the test! It is not for thee to test a servant who ardently supplicateth the Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من یمتحن عبدالبهاء لیس لک ان تمتحن عبدا متضرعا الی الله اما قرات فی کتاب
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @symbolism, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
